# USPTO Patents MCP

> US patent search, assignee portfolios, citation-graph BFS, weekly grant digest webhooks

This MCP server exposes 5 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `uspto_patent_search`: Free-text patent search with assignee, inventor, date filters.
- `uspto_read_patent`: Full patent record: title, date, abstract, claims, assignees, inventors.
- `uspto_assignee_portfolio`: Every patent assigned to an entity (server-side paginated, max 5000).
- `uspto_citation_graph`: BFS the citation graph forward / backward / both around a patent.
- `uspto_subscribe_grants`: Weekly digest of new grants matching a saved query (webhook on Tuesdays).

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://uspto-patents-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
